description: Defines custom column headers for a data table, with each label rendered as KaTeX supporting LaTeX math notation.
utility: Define custom column headers for a table

arguments.name: labels
arguments.description: Header label strings - e.g., "n", "n^2", "\\sin(n)". Each label corresponds to one table column.

alternates.description: Simple headers that match the formula columns
Headers with LaTeX math notation for display

examples.scenario: Header row for ellipse properties datatable
examples.expression: mathexpr_1=datatable(at(2,2),data("(x^(2))/(b^(2))+(y^(2))/(a^(2))=1","(x^(2))/(4)+(y^(2))/(25)=1"),header("text(   Equation )","text(major axis)","c^2","text(foci)","text(length of minor axis)","text(length of major axis)","text(eccentricity)","text(LLR)","text(Vertices)"),c(black))

examples.scenario: Table with descriptive headers different from formulas
